title: psychanthus racemiger
side_effects: Psychanthus racemiger can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, in individuals who consume it. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to neurological symptoms, including dizziness, confusion, and in severe cases, seizures. In addition, improper use of this plant may result in allergic reactions, including skin irritation, respiratory distress, and anaphylaxis in sensitive individuals. It is essential to handle and use Psychanthus racemiger with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
